zh.Rostherne Castle, Rostherne, Cheshire, E: 英國英格蘭爾洛斯黑爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert MAINWARING於大約1168年出生在英國爾瓦明加姆時，他的父親Roger de Mainwaring39歲，母親Ellen de Warmingham36歲。他於1208年之前與Ellen de Rostherne在英國英格蘭爾洛斯黑爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世在英國爾洛斯黑爾。

zh-hans.Rostherne Castle, Rostherne, Cheshire, E: 英国英格兰爾洛斯黑爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert MAINWARING于大约1168年出生在英国爾瓦明加姆时，他的父亲Roger de Mainwaring39岁，母亲Ellen de Warmingham36岁。他于1208年之前与Ellen de Rostherne在英国英格兰爾洛斯黑爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世在英国爾洛斯黑爾。

nameMeanings.name: MAINWARING
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert MAINWARING was born about 1168, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger de Mainwaring, was 39 and his mother, Ellen de Warmingham, was 36. He married Ellen de Rostherne before 1208, in Rostherne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in Rostherne, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert MAINWARING est né environ 1168, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Mainwaring, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Warmingham, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ellen de Rostherne avant 1208, à Rostherne, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé à Rostherne, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert MAINWARING um 1168 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Mainwaring 39 und seine Mutter Ellen de Warmingham 36. Er hat vor 1208 in Rostherne, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen de Rostherne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Rostherne, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert MAINWARING è nato il circa 1168 nel Warmingham, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Mainwaring, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ellen de Warmingham, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Ellen de Rostherne prima del 1208, nel Rostherne, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Rostherne, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert MAINWARINGが約1168年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父Roger de Mainwaringは39歳，母Ellen de Warminghamは36歳であった。1208年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアロススエルンでEllen de Rostherneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスチェシュアイアロススエルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert MAINWARING(이)가 대략 1168년 영국 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Mainwaring(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen de Warmingham(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1208년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 로스더니에서 Ellen de Rostherne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 체실르 로스더니에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert MAINWARING nasceu aproximadamente 1168, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Mainwaring, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ellen de Warmingham, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen de Rostherne antes 1208, em Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert MAINWARING родился около 1168 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Mainwaring было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Warmingham, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Rostherne перед 1208 г. в местности ростирн, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в местности ростирн, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert MAINWARING nació aproximadamente 1168, en Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Mainwaring, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ellen de Warmingham, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Ellen de Rostherne antes de 1208, en Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Rostherne, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
